name: Simulation Node
author: Henosync Team
description: A simulated node for testing missions without hardware

home_lat.label: Home Latitude
home_lat.description: Starting latitude for the simulated device.

home_lon.label: Home Longitude
home_lon.description: Starting longitude for the simulated device.

tick_rate_hz.label: Telemetry Rate
tick_rate_hz.description: How often the simulated node emits a telemetry update.

battery_drain_rate.label: Battery Drain Rate (%/s)
battery_drain_rate.description: How quickly the simulated battery depletes per second.

random_signal.label: Simulate Signal Variation
random_signal.description: Randomly vary signal strength to simulate a real radio environment.

device_label.label: Device Label
device_label.description: Optional label reported in the status_text telemetry field.
